creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please include the patch version of
http://git.savannah.gnu.org/cgit/libtool.git/commit/?id=2680f79c22

until the time that libtool can be updated to version 2.4.

It fixes gazillions of warnings emitted by each and every autoconf'ed
package using libtool. See the thread around
http://www.mail-archive.com/bug-autoconf@gnu.org/msg03062.html for a
discussion.
